description_long: This is a karambit-style knife featuring a dramatically curved, single-edged blade with a sharp point, designed for slashing and hooking motions. The blade is metallic with a dark, matte finish and a subtle marking near the base. The handle is ergonomically contoured with three finger grooves and a prominent finger ring at the end, providing a secure grip and enhanced control. The handle appears to be made of a dark green polymer or composite material, contrasting with the blade's metallic sheen. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements. This knife is compact and lightweight, suitable for close-quarters use or as a utility tool in urban environments.
description: A compact karambit knife with a curved, dark metallic blade and an ergonomic green handle featuring finger grooves and a ring pommel. The design is tactical and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade and the ergonomic handle with finger grooves and a ring pommel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the curvature of the blade and the circular finger ring at the end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curve, the handle's contours, and the ring pommel from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the blade's arc and the depth of the finger grooves in the handle.
attribute_handle_design: contoured polymer handle with finger grooves and a ring pommel
